name: workflow closed-loop end-to-end reports a per-step status summary covering the full chain
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/closed-loop-test.sh" --end-to-end --emit summary 2>out.txt && grep -q 'step=describe' out.txt && grep -q 'step=architect' out.txt && grep -q 'step=adr' out.txt && grep -q 'step=spec' out.txt && grep -q 'step=plan-first' out.txt && grep -q 'step=feature' out.txt && grep -q 'step=commit' out.txt && grep -q 'step=git-workflow' out.txt && grep -q 'step=pr' out.txt && grep -q 'step=audit-pack' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
